<?php

/**
 * @file
 * Fixture: modern renderer usage that must NOT be flagged.
 *
 * Note: a helper named my_drupal_render_helper() would not match either,
 * because \bdrupal_render requires a word boundary before "drupal_render".
 */

function my_module_preprocess_block(array &$variables): void {
  $build = ['#markup' => 'hi'];
  $variables['rendered'] = \Drupal::service('renderer')->renderInIsolation($build);
}
